title: Fresh Crumbly Japanese Bulgur Pilaf
description: A fresh and crumbly Japanese-style pilaf made with paleo-friendly bulgur wheat and other ingredients for a nutritious dish suitable for monsoon season.

ingredients.name: 1 can (6 oz) Black Beans, rinsed and drained

instructions: Heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add onions and garlic to the pan and sauté until soft, about 3 minutes.
Add Bulgur Wheat to the pan, stir well to coat with oil and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Gradually add water or almond milk while stirring continuously. Bring mixture to a boil then reduce heat and simmer until liquid is absorbed, about 5-7 minutes.
Stir in black beans and cook for another minute. Remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving.
Serve immediately as a snack with desired toppings like fresh herbs or vegan cheese.
